name: Veritex Holdings, Inc.
description: Veritex Holdings, Inc. is a bank holding company that operates through its wholly-owned subsidiary, Veritex Community Bank. Headquartered in Texas, the company provides a comprehensive range of commercial banking products and services tailored to meet the needs of small to medium-sized businesses, professionals, and individuals. Veritex focuses on delivering personalized financial solutions, leveraging its community-oriented approach to support local economic growth. Through its network of branches, the bank offers various deposit products, commercial and industrial loans, and real estate financing, positioning itself as a key financial partner within the Texas market.
